summary.zh: 新冠疫情打乱了赛历开局，随后维斯塔潘与红牛在 2021 年终结梅赛德斯长达七年的统治；2022 年规则大改让“地面效应”时隔四十年回归，配合 18 英寸轮毂与预算帽，下压力主力交还给底板文丘里通道；2025 年迈凯伦时隔十余年重返车手冠军之列。
summary.en: The pandemic disrupted the decade's opening before Verstappen and Red Bull ended Mercedes' seven-year reign in 2021; the 2022 rules reset returned ground effect after four decades, pairing 18-inch wheels and a budget cap as the downforce burden moved to the floor's Venturi tunnels; in 2025 McLaren returned to the drivers' title after more than a decade.
